# FerroDruid Corporate Contributor License Agreement

Version 1.0 (2026)

Thank you for your Corporation's interest in contributing to FerroDruid (the
"Project"), a project of abyo software 合同会社 (abyo software LLC), a
limited liability company organized under the laws of Japan ("abyo
software", "we", "us").

This Corporate Contributor License Agreement (this "Agreement") documents
the rights the Corporation grants to abyo software in Contributions
submitted by its designated employees. This Agreement allows an entity to
submit Contributions to the Project, to authorize Contributions submitted by
its designated employees, and to grant the licenses set out below.

**How this Agreement is executed.** Please have this Agreement completed and
signed by a person authorized to bind the Corporation, then submit the
signed Agreement (a scanned copy or a digitally signed document) by email to
**aws-support@abyo.net**. abyo software will confirm receipt and record the
designated employees listed in Schedule A. Individual contributors who are
not covered by a Corporate CLA sign the Individual Contributor License
Agreement instead (see `.github/CLA/individual-cla.md`).

Except for the licenses granted in this Agreement, You reserve all right,
title, and interest in and to Your Contributions.

## 1. Definitions

"Corporation" means the legal entity identified in the signature block
below. "You" (or "Your") means the Corporation. No parent, subsidiary, or
other affiliate is bound by this Agreement solely because of its
affiliation with the Corporation or because it or its employee is listed in
Schedule A. An affiliate becomes bound only by executing a written
accession accepted by abyo software. Upon acceptance, that affiliate will
be treated as the "Corporation" and "You" under this Agreement solely with
respect to Contributions it owns or controls and Contributions submitted by
its Designated Employees.

"Designated Employee" means an individual whose designation on Schedule A,
as updated under Section 6, was effective at the time of submission.

"Contribution" means any original work of authorship, including any
modifications or additions to an existing work, that is intentionally
submitted to abyo software for inclusion in, or documentation of, the
Project by a Designated Employee. For the purposes of
this definition, "submitted" means any form of
electronic, verbal, or written communication sent to abyo software or its
representatives, including but not limited to pull requests, patches, source
code, documentation, and issue comments submitted through the Project's
repository or communication channels managed by, or on behalf of, abyo
software — but excluding any communication that is conspicuously marked or
otherwise designated in writing by You as "Not a Contribution."

"Work" means the FerroDruid software and its documentation owned or managed
by abyo software, to which Contributions are submitted.

## 2. Grant of Copyright License

Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, You hereby grant to
abyo software a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge,
royalty-free, irrevocable license, with the unrestricted right to grant
sublicenses through one or more tiers, under all copyrights and equivalent
rights that You own or control in the Contributions. This grant expressly
includes all rights provided by Articles 21 through 28 of the Copyright Act
of Japan and corresponding rights under the laws of any jurisdiction,
including the rights to use, reproduce, modify, translate, adapt, arrange,
create and exploit derivative works, publicly perform, publicly display,
present on screen, recite, exhibit, transmit or communicate to the public
(including making available for transmission), distribute, transfer, rent,
import, export, and otherwise exploit the Contributions and derivative
works thereof, in source-code, object-code, documentation, or any other
form.

abyo software may exercise and sublicense those rights, separately or as
part of the Work, commercially or non-commercially, with or without charge,
under one or more licenses concurrently or successively, including: (a) the
Business Source License 1.1 as configured for the Project, including its
Additional Use Grant and its automatic grant of rights under the Apache
License, Version 2.0 on the applicable Change Date; (b) proprietary or
commercial terms, including offerings distributed through AWS Marketplace;
and (c) any present or future open-source, source-available, proprietary,
or other license terms selected by abyo software. No further consent from
You is required for any such licensing or relicensing.

## 3. Grant of Patent License

Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, You hereby grant to
abyo software a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge,
royalty-free, irrevocable (except as stated in this section) patent
license, with the right to grant sublicenses directly or through multiple
tiers to abyo software's affiliates, licensees, sublicensees, distributors,
service providers, customers, and recipients of the Work or derivative
works, to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell, import, export, and
otherwise transfer or exploit the Work and such derivative works. This
license applies only to patent claims licensable by You that are
necessarily infringed by Your Contribution alone or by the combination of
Your Contribution with the Work to which it was submitted.

If a person or entity receiving a patent license under this Section
institutes patent litigation against any person or entity, including by
cross-claim or counterclaim, alleging that the Work or a Contribution
incorporated in the Work directly or indirectly infringes a patent, all
patent licenses granted under this Section to the litigating person or
entity for that Work terminate as of the filing date.

## 4. Moral Rights

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, You irrevocably consent
to, and agree not to assert or exercise against abyo software, its
affiliates, successors, licensees, sublicensees, distributors, or
recipients, any moral rights, rights of attribution, rights of integrity,
rights of disclosure or publication, or analogous personal rights that You
hold in a Contribution, insofar as their acts are authorized by this
Agreement. This covenant includes consent to modification, translation,
adaptation, combination with other works, publication or non-publication,
and use with, without, or under a changed attribution notice.

Because moral rights may belong personally to the individual author, before
an individual is designated on Schedule A You must obtain and retain from
that individual a written or electronically signed covenant covering the
individual's Contributions on terms no less protective than this Section.
Upon reasonable request, You will provide abyo software evidence of that
covenant. Designation on Schedule A constitutes Your representation that
this requirement has been satisfied.

## 5. Your Representations

1. You represent that You own or control all copyrights, patent rights, and
   other rights necessary to grant the licenses in this Agreement.

2. You represent that each Contribution was created by a Designated
   Employee within the scope of that employee's duties, or that before
   submission You obtained from every relevant author or rights holder all
   assignments, licenses, consents, and other authority necessary to grant
   the rights in this Agreement.

3. You represent that each Designated Employee is authorized to submit
   Contributions on Your behalf and that no employment agreement,
   third-party agreement, law, or other obligation prevents the grants made
   here.

4. Each submission must disclose complete details of any third-party code,
   content, license, patent, trademark, or other restriction of which You
   are aware and that is associated with the submission (see Section 8 for
   submissions that are not Your original creation).

5. You agree to notify abyo software of any facts or circumstances of which
   You become aware that would make these representations inaccurate in any
   respect.

## 6. Designated Employees; Updating Schedule A

Contributions covered by this Agreement are those submitted by an
individual while that individual's designation as a Designated Employee
was effective under this Section. It is Your
responsibility to notify abyo software when any change is required to the
list of Designated Employees authorized to submit Contributions on behalf
of the Corporation, or to the Corporation's point of contact with abyo
software. Send updates by email to **aws-support@abyo.net** from the
point-of-contact email address given in the signature block (or a successor
address notified in the same way), stating the employees to be added or
removed, each employee's employing legal entity, and each employee's GitHub
username and immutable GitHub numeric user ID.

An addition takes effect only from abyo software's confirmation of receipt,
and covers only Contributions submitted after that confirmation unless the
confirmation expressly provides retroactive coverage. Removals take effect
prospectively upon confirmation; removal of a Designated Employee does not
affect the licenses granted for Contributions submitted before the removal
took effect.

## 7. Support; Disclaimer of Warranty

You are not expected to provide support for Your Contributions, except to
the extent You desire to provide support. You may provide support for free,
for a fee, or not at all. Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in
writing, You provide Your Contributions on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT
WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied, including,
without limitation, any warranties or conditions of TITLE, NON-INFRINGEMENT,
MERCHANTABILITY, or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

## 8. Submissions That Are Not Your Original Creation

Should You wish to submit work that is not Your original creation, You may
submit it to abyo software separately from any Contribution, identifying the
complete details of its source and of any license or other restriction
(including, but not limited to, related patents, trademarks, and license
agreements) of which You are aware, and conspicuously marking the work as
"Submitted on behalf of a third party: [named here]".

## 9. Governing Law; Jurisdiction; Severability

This Agreement is governed by, and shall be construed in accordance with,
the laws of Japan, without regard to its conflict-of-law rules. The Tokyo
District Court has exclusive jurisdiction as the court of first instance
over any dispute arising out of or relating to this Agreement.

If any provision of this Agreement is held invalid or unenforceable, it
will be enforced to the maximum extent permitted by law, and the remaining
provisions will remain in effect.

Please have this Agreement signed by an authorized representative of the
Corporation and submit it by email to **aws-support@abyo.net**.

## Schedule A — Initial List of Designated Employees

List each employee authorized to submit Contributions on behalf of the
Corporation: GitHub username, immutable GitHub numeric user ID, full name,
and employing legal entity. Attach additional pages if needed; update the
list per Section 6. Designation of each individual constitutes the
representation described in Section 4 (moral-rights covenant obtained and
retained). An employee of an affiliate may be designated only after that
affiliate's written accession has been accepted by abyo software.
